temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) The scene opens with a low-angle shot of a dark, narrow, and grimy staircase. The walls are stained and peeling, and a small, dark window is visible at the top of the landing. The camera then pans to the right, revealing a red diamond-shaped 'Fu' (good fortune) character decoration hanging on a dark wooden door, suggesting a transition from a bleak interior to a doorway. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a dark and mysterious atmosphere, setting a suspenseful tone for the events to follow.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A tense, rhythmic, and percussive score begins, building suspense.)
(00:03-00:05) A man in a dark suit and tie stands in front of a wall covered with large, weathered maps. He holds a folder and speaks with a serious expression, gesturing with his hand. The maps are pinned to the wall with clear tape, showing various locations. (Storyline: A character is delivering a briefing, likely about a mission or operation. The maps indicate that the topic involves travel to different locations.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Serious, informative. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, percussive music continues.)
